gradient_budget_mlp.note: 8 envs × 4096 n_steps = 32768 samples/rollout; 32768/2048 = 16 minibatches × 10 epochs = 160 grad steps/rollout; at 10M steps → ~305 rollouts → ~48.8K total grad steps (4× prior run)

gradient_budget_hierarchical.note: 8 envs × 2048 n_steps = 16384 samples/rollout; 16384/256 = 64 minibatches × 5 epochs = 320 grad steps/rollout; at 15M steps → ~916 rollouts → ~293K total grad steps

training_methods.standard: src/training/train.py — MLP PPO [2048,1024,512], default 10M steps, batch=2048, n_epochs=10
training_methods.hierarchical: src/training/train_hierarchical.py — BC(100 epochs) + Transformer+MoE PPO(15M, n_epochs=5)

pd_controller.reference: Go1 specs: 23.7 Nm hip/thigh, 35.55 Nm knee

reward_scales_v6.note: See REWARD_SCALES in src/env/cheetah_env.py for authoritative values
key_changes_from_v5: r_smooth: -0.05 L2 → -0.01 L1 (5x reduction + L1 tolerates cyclic gait swings)
Gait sub-components: +stride_freq_reward (exp kernel on touchdown count, targets trot=2)
Trot symmetry: abs→sqrt for smoother gradient
Foot clearance target: 0.05m → 0.08m (proper leg swing height)
Run mode r_linvel multiplier: 1.5 → 2.0, r_gait: 1.0 → 1.5, r_smooth: 0.5x
LR floor: 0 → 1e-5 (prevents clip_fraction→0 and frozen std)
